name: Choi Jong-in
effect: [On Play] Look at the top three cards of your deck. Reveal up to one <Trait:Fourth Jeju Island Raid> card and add it to your hand. Place the remaining cards on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you added a card to your hand, place one card from your hand into your Outside Area.

name: Choi Jong-in
effect:
6[Raid] <Choi Jong-in>
@[On Play] If you have five or more <Trait:Fourth Jeju Island Raid> cards on your field, all characters with 1500 or more BP on your opponent's front line lose 1000 BP until the end of the turn.
@[When Attacking] You may choose one of the following. If you do, this character remains set to resting the next time it would be switched to active.
@・Activate this character's [On Play] ability.
@・Choose up to one character with 2000 or less BP on your opponent's front line and retire it.
